question: Show all author names and the numbers of books each has written.
sql: SELECT Author.Name, COUNT(Book.ISBN) AS num_books FROM Author JOIN Author_Book ON Author.idAuthor = Author_Book.Author JOIN Book ON Author_Book.ISBN = Book.ISBN GROUP BY Author.Name;

back_translation.intent: 统计每位作者所著的书籍数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示所有作者姓名及其著作数量，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、聚合、分组均与之匹配。
